title: Sarcosiphon episcopalis

intro: Sarcosiphon episcopalis, also known as hornwort, is a perennial aquatic plant native to North America, characterized by its unique, horn-like appearance and ability to thrive in a variety of aquatic environments. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
